name: Selkirk Vanguard Power Air
description: The Selkirk Vanguard Power Air represents the pinnacle of paddle engineering. Featuring a proprietary air-injected polypropylene core and a carbon fiber face with QuadFlex 4-layer construction, it delivers unmatched power without sacrificing spin or control. Built for tournament-level play.
care_instructions: Clean with a microfiber cloth dampened with water. Avoid chemical cleaners that may degrade the carbon fiber surface. The edge guard is replaceable — contact Selkirk for parts.
